topic: Eco-HAB mouse social behavior automated home-cage monitoring
review_question: What automated home-cage monitoring approaches have been used to quantify social behavior in mice, and what outcomes have they reported?
search_terms: "home cage" mouse social behavior automated monitoring
inclusion_criteria: Studies mice or rats in a home-cage or semi-natural automated monitoring setting
Reports behavioral, social, preference, dominance, activity, or interaction outcomes
exclusion_criteria: Review, editorial, protocol-only, or commentary article
No automated monitoring or no behavioral outcome
Non-rodent study unless directly relevant as a method comparison
Unavailable abstract and unavailable full text
extraction_detail_instructions: Write a detailed 6-10 sentence paper summary when abstract or full-text metadata is available.
Separate methods, outcomes, main results, conclusions, limitations, and review relevance.
Capture sample size, animal strain/species, sex, intervention, comparator, time window, apparatus, and measured variables whenever reported.
Extract numerical findings, p-values, effect directions, units, and confidence intervals whenever reported.
Clearly mark fields as missing when the abstract or metadata does not provide the information.
custom_extraction_questions: What automated home-cage or monitoring system was used?
What behavior categories were measured, especially social interaction, activity, preference, dominance, feeding, drinking, or cognition?
What animal model, strain, sex, age, and sample size were used?
What were the main behavioral findings and how strong was the evidence?
How directly does this paper answer the review question?
